title: Rainbow Trims
description: Modify each ArmorTrim as you like it
body:
# ! INFO ! # This project has reached end of life and will no longer be maintained # 📝 Description If you like RGB or find the normal Armor Trims too boring this mod is perfect for you! It adds a cool RGB effect to the vanilla Armor Trims, which you can activate or deactivate in the settings. You can also deactivate the trims completely You can use this mod in a single player world or on a server without any problems. ![Rainbow Trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sRTgAZkT/images/4ec224226cd81e818d461a79a566905eaf37b544.gif) # ⚒️ Configuration You need the [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) and the [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) mod for all configurations. Changes to the settings take effect immediately. No restart is necessary **Possible settings**: - Enable/disable the animation (enabled by default) - Hide all Trims (disabled by default) - Set the animation speed (7000 by default)
*Note: The smaller the value, the faster the animation will be and at very high values, the animation may become unstable.* - Set a custom color
